'''tadhazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabezone|cabezone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabezone|cabezone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadhazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhæzhæth|tædhæzhæth]] || [[word:tædhæzhæj|tædhæzhæj]] || [[word:tædhæzhæsh|tædhæzhæsh]] || [[word:tædhæzhæ|tædhæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhadhazhath|tadhadhazhath]] || [[word:tadhadhazhaj|tadhadhazhaj]] || [[word:tadhadhazhash|tadhadhazhash]] || [[word:tadhadhazha|tadhadhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhazhath|tadhazhath]] || [[word:tadhazhaj|tadhazhaj]] || [[word:tadhazhash|tadhazhash]] || [[word:tadhazha|tadhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhafzhath|tadhafzhath]] || [[word:tadhafzhaj|tadhafzhaj]] || [[word:tadhafzhash|tadhafzhash]] || [[word:tadhafzhaf|tadhafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhazhatha|tadhazhatha]] || [[word:tadhazhaja|tadhazhaja]] || [[word:tadhazhasha|tadhazhasha]] || [[word:tadhazhaka|tadhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhazhath|tadhazhath]] || [[word:tadhazhaj|tadhazhaj]] || [[word:tadhazhash|tadhazhash]] || [[word:tadhazha|tadhazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhazhathal|tadhazhathal]] || [[word:tadhazhajal|tadhazhajal]] || [[word:tadhazhashal|tadhazhashal]] || [[word:tadhazhakal|tadhazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhazhathatha|tadhazhathatha]] || [[word:tadhazhajaja|tadhazhajaja]] || [[word:tadhazhashasha|tadhazhashasha]] || [[word:tadhazhaka|tadhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhazhathan|tadhazhathan]] || [[word:tadhazhajan|tadhazhajan]] || [[word:tadhazhashan|tadhazhashan]] || [[word:tadhazhakan|tadhazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhazhathaoro|tadhazhathaoro]] || [[word:tadhazhajaoro|tadhazhajaoro]] || [[word:tadhazhashaoro|tadhazhashaoro]] || [[word:tadhazhakaoro|tadhazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
